Package index

All functions

caption_pop()
Add Custom Captions with Icons to a geom_pop object
draw_key_pop_image()
Key drawing function for population-based image keys
fetch_df_coordinates()
Fetches the df_coordinates_final Dataset
geom_icon_point()
Create a scatter plot with Font Awesome icons instead of points
geom_pop()
Create a circular representative population chart
process_data()
Process Population Data for Visualization
scale_legend_icon()
Legend helper for geom_pop icon legends
